evals.prompt: Give me an intelligence briefing on X right now: what's happening/trending, which tweets I should reply to, and what I should tweet about. Use the live site.
evals.expected_output: A three-section briefing (what's happening / where to engage / what to tweet) sourced from the For You feed + Explore (News/Trending), with fresh (<=12h prioritized, older flagged) items, real engagement numbers, and tweet links. Following feed not used.
assertions: Contains all three sections: what's happening, where to engage, what to tweet
Sources from For You + Explore and excludes the Following feed
Handles freshness (ages present; older-than-12h items flagged)
Gives concrete tweet links for engagement targets
Actively excludes promoted ads: explicitly identifies and drops promoted/brand (null-timestamp) tweets, and surfaces no promoted-brand account as a content item

evals.prompt: scrape twitter for me — what's blowing up right now and where could I jump into the conversation?
evals.expected_output: A briefing of currently-trending/high-engagement X content plus concrete engagement targets (tweets worth replying to), sourced from For You + Explore, fresh within ~12h, with links. Not sourced from the Following timeline.
assertions: Contains all three sections: what's happening, where to engage, what to tweet
Sources from For You + Explore and excludes the Following feed
Handles freshness (ages present; older-than-12h items flagged)
Gives concrete tweet links for engagement targets
Actively excludes promoted ads: explicitly identifies and drops promoted/brand (null-timestamp) tweets, and surfaces no promoted-brand account as a content item
